title: NOTICE TO CANCEL – RFP – Regional Housing Needs Assessment
summary: UPDATE Kawerak, Inc., (Kawerak), a tribal consortium and non-profit corporation in Nome, Alaska, is soliciting proposals from qualified candidates to conduct a Regional Housing Needs Assessment and planning meeting facilitation. Deadline: Proposals will be accepted until April 12, 2024 at 5pm Alaska...
